name: roost
description: Roost framework skills — scaffold projects, generate code, fetch docs

skills.name: roost-new
skills.description: Scaffold a new Roost project on Cloudflare Workers

skills.name: roost-make
skills.description: Generate Roost code artifacts (model, agent, job, middleware, tool, controller, mcp-server)

skills.name: roost-docs
skills.description: Fetch Roost documentation. Pass a topic to get specific content.

skills.name: roost-conventions
skills.description: Get Roost file structure, naming conventions, and import patterns
